name: AI Council System
next_task: Improve general task type compression from 4% to 15%+ savings
current_focus: Token savings optimization — general/codegen task types at 4% savings vs target 20%+
completion_checks: All AI calls routed to free providers first (Groq → Gemini → Cerebras → Ollama)
TOON compression enabled for all task types including codegen
savings_pct written to DB on every call (not zero)
general task type achieves 15%+ average savings
Free tier governor tracking prevents provider exhaustion
LIFEOS_DIRECTED_MODE=true prevents all autonomous AI loops
No paid Anthropic/OpenAI calls unless explicitly triggered
anti_drift_notes: TOON compression was previously disabled for codegen task type — it is now ENABLED. The whitespace stripper uses \n{2,} not \n{3,}. The persistToDB function in token-optimizer.js is intentionally a no-op — savings-ledger.js is the authoritative writer. configureAiGuard() must NOT call ensureExpectedRealityHash() — only lazy init on first request. Free tier governor buffer is 3% (not 10%) — this is intentional.

decision_debt.description: general task type at 4% savings — needs phrase table expansion and IR compiler tuning
